{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = EXPERIMENTAL – DANGEROUS
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|One vial of the mixture is labeled '[[EXPERIMENTAL – DANGEROUS]]' in [[Petal]]'s hand.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The next vial was labeled, in Petal’s hand, “EXPERIMENTAL – DANGEROUS.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
